client.welcomeBody: Your training, nutrition, and progress — coached, in one place.
client.trainBody: Log every set as you train. Raptor tracks your PRs, streak, and what's next.
client.trackBody: Log food (or scan a barcode), then watch weight, InBody, and your league rank move.
client.coachBody: Message, send voice notes, and get feedback on your workouts — right here.

coach.welcomeBody: Coach more clients with less busywork — your whole roster in one place.
coach.clientsBody: See who needs attention, who's on track, and message anyone in a tap.
coach.plansBody: Create training & nutrition plans — or draft them with AI — and assign in seconds.
coach.performanceBody: Adherence, top performers, and what's working — on the Performance tab.

ffmiInfo.title: What is FFMI?
ffmiInfo.what: FFMI (Fat-Free Mass Index) measures how much lean muscle you carry for your height — your weight minus body fat, normalised by height. A higher FFMI means more muscle on your frame, so taller and shorter athletes can compete fairly.
ffmiInfo.verified: Only coach-verified InBody readings count — no one can self-report their way up.
ffmiInfo.tiersNote: You're placed in the highest tier your FFMI reaches. Bands differ for men and women to match body-composition norms.

achievements.title: Trophies
achievements.subtitle: Earn these by training — they show on your profile.
achievements.empty: No trophies yet. Log a workout to earn your first.

coachProfile.transformationsHelp: Feature before/after results of clients who opted in. Pick a client, add two photos and a caption.
coachProfile.noConsentingClients: No clients have opted in yet
coachProfile.noConsentingClientsSub: A client must turn on "Let my coach feature me" on their profile first.
coachProfile.deleteMessage: This removes it from your public profile.

clientTransformation.title: Before & after
clientTransformation.help: Build a before/after and send it to your coach to feature on their profile.
clientTransformation.noCoachSub: You need a coach to send a transformation. Find one in Discover.
clientTransformation.consentNote: Sending lets your coach feature your before/after on their public profile. You can turn this off anytime in Public presence.
clientTransformation.sent: Sent to your coach for review.

performance.label: PERFORMANCE
performance.title: Performance
performance.subtitle: Your KPIs and client rankings, all in one place.

language.title: Language
language.restartBody: The app will restart to apply the new layout direction.
language.restartBodyManual: To apply the new layout direction, fully close the app and open it again.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptySub: When something happens, it'll show up here.

clientNote.title: New client note
clientNote.body: {{name}} left a note on their training

notifications.settingsSub: Choose what you get notified about.

chat.title: Chat
chat.editWindowBody: Messages can only be edited for a short time after sending.
chat.micDeniedBody: Allow microphone access to record a voice note.
chat.blockedBody: Your account has been restricted for violating our community guidelines.
chat.disclaimerBody: Keep it respectful. Harassment, threats, or abuse get your whole account banned — and if the other person asks, we'll support legal action and share what the law allows.

report.title: Report message
report.policy: Harassment, threats, or abuse aren't tolerated and can lead to a permanent ban. Our team reviews every report.
report.thanksBody: Our team will review this message.
report.failBody: Please try again in a moment.

moderation.emptySub: Reported messages will show up here.
moderation.failed: Could not complete the action. Please try again.
moderation.dismissBody: Close this report with no action?
moderation.banBody: Ban {{name}} from sending messages? They can be unbanned later.
moderation.approveBody: Lift the ban on {{name}}? They'll be able to message again.
moderation.rejectBody: Keep {{name}} banned and close this appeal?

appeal.title: Appeal your ban
appeal.prompt: Tell us why this ban should be reviewed. Our team reads every appeal.
appeal.submittedBody: Our team will review it and get back to you.
appeal.failBody: Please try again in a moment.

guidelines.title: Community guidelines
guidelines.intro: This is a space for coaches and clients to work together. A few rules keep it safe for everyone.
guidelines.conductBody: Treat people the way you'd want to be treated. No harassment, hate, threats, or sharing someone's private information.
guidelines.banBody: Harassment, threats, or abuse get your entire account banned — not just one conversation. We review every report.
guidelines.reportBody: Long-press any message sent to you and tap Report. We see only the reported message, never your whole conversation.
guidelines.appealBody: If your account is banned, you can appeal from any chat. An admin will review it and either restore your access or keep the ban.
guidelines.legalBody: If the other party requests it, we will support legal action and cooperate with the relevant authorities, sharing the account information the law allows.

auth.invalidCredentials: Enter a valid email and a password of at least 8 characters.

auth.createFailed: Could not create your account. Please try again.

auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.resetFailed: Could not reset your password. Request a new link and try again.

onboarding.finishingBody: We’re getting your account ready. If this doesn’t move along in a moment, sign out and back in.

expHint.beginner: New to training, or less than ~1 year of consistent workouts.
expHint.intermediate: 1–3 years of consistent training; comfortable with the main lifts.
expHint.advanced: 3+ years of structured training and programming.

activityHint.sedentary: Little or no exercise; mostly sitting (desk job).
activityHint.very_active: Very hard daily training, or a physical job / two-a-days.

profile.handleHint: Your unique @username. Changeable once every 14 days.
profile.handleCooldown: You can change your username once every 14 days.
